description: Perform a hierarchical multiple regression analysis on the dataset 'ExamAnxiety.csv' to predict 'Exam' scores, using 'Anxiety' as the covariate in the first block and 'Revise' as the covariate in the second block. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/HierarchicalRegression.omv. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/hierarchical_regression_report.txt containing the following values rounded to 4 decimal places: Model1_R2, Model2_R2, R2_Change, R2_Change_Significant (yes or no), Revise_B, and Anxiety_B_Model2.
